topIngredients.name: Prebiotic Thermal Water
topIngredients.benefit: La Roche-Posay's signature soothing ingredient from French thermal springs

topIngredients.name: Niacinamide
topIngredients.benefit: Strengthens the skin barrier and evens skin tone

verdict: La Roche-Posay Toleriane Double Repair UV elegantly combines daily moisturizer and SPF protection in one product. The prebiotic thermal water base is genuinely calming for reactive skin.
